response.overview: Wall Wizards follows a young couple, Jamie and Brooke, as they move into their first home together. They’re expecting a fresh start, not a magical infestation. When their belongings begin to mysteriously disappear, they uncover a hidden world of tiny, mischievous wizards living inside their walls. What starts as a cozy move-in day quickly turns into curiosity, chaos, and unexpected magic.  At its core, Wall Wizards is about learning to coexist with the unexpected. It explores the experience of starting a new chapter, merging routines, navigating surprises, and embracing the unpredictability that comes with love and commitment. The wizards serve as a magical metaphor for the small, chaotic moments that shape relationships.
response.title: Wall Wizards
